# Geotecnia1 — Diadema

> Geotechnical engineering services in Diadema, Brasil.

## Services
- [Ancoragens](https://diadema.geotecnia1.org/ancoragens/)
- [Cbr Viario](https://diadema.geotecnia1.org/cbr-viario/)

## Contact
- Website: https://diadema.geotecnia1.org/

## About
This site provides geotechnical engineering services in Diadema, Brasil.
Compliant with local and international standards (ASTM, ISO, country-specific norms).
